name: brothers-protocol-cli-mvp

scripts.build:tui: esbuild src/tui/index.tsx src/tui/App.tsx src/tui/lib.ts src/tui/screens/TaskList.tsx src/tui/screens/TaskDetail.tsx src/tui/screens/CreateTask.tsx src/tui/components/StatusBar.tsx src/tui/components/Badge.tsx --format=esm --platform=node --outdir=dist/tui --jsx=automatic

description: Markdown-first CLI for safe task handoff between AI agents — Relay Baton protocol
